title: Emoji_aiAurora Performance Benchmark
description: Performance thresholds and measurement criteria for all system components

metrics.name: Avatar FPS - idle state
metrics.description: Frames per second when avatar is in neutral/idle state with no interaction

metrics.name: Avatar FPS - emotion transition
metrics.description: FPS during emotion transition animation

metrics.name: Avatar FPS - shake animation (angry)
metrics.description: FPS during angry shake animation

metrics.name: Avatar FPS - pulse animation (intense emotions)
metrics.description: FPS during scale pulse animation

metrics.name: Emotion transition time
metrics.description: Time for avatar to fully transition from one emotion to another
metrics.measurement: Time from setCurrentEmotion call to visual state fully updated

metrics.name: LLM first token latency - OpenAI
metrics.description: Time from request to first token received

metrics.name: LLM first token latency - Ollama
metrics.description: Time from request to first token received (local)

metrics.name: Emotion detection latency
metrics.description: Time to detect emotion from complete response

metrics.name: Text streaming display latency
metrics.description: Time from token received to display

metrics.name: ASR start latency
metrics.description: Time from click to recording active

metrics.name: ASR transcription time
metrics.description: Time from audio sent to text received

metrics.name: TTS first audio latency
metrics.description: Time from text sent to first audio chunk

metrics.name: TTS stream chunk interval
metrics.description: Time between consecutive audio chunks

metrics.name: TTS playback gap (stream mode)
metrics.description: Gap between sentences during stream playback

metrics.name: Initial memory usage
metrics.description: Memory after app loads, before any interaction

metrics.name: Memory after 10 chat messages
metrics.description: Memory growth after sustained usage

metrics.name: Memory leak detection - 50 messages
metrics.description: Check for memory growth without GC

metrics.name: Audio buffer cleanup
metrics.description: Memory released after voice recording stops

metrics.name: Input response time
metrics.description: Time from keypress to character displayed

metrics.name: Chat scroll performance
metrics.description: FPS during rapid scrolling of chat history

metrics.name: Code splitting effectiveness
metrics.description: Vendor chunks should be separate from app code

measurement_tools.description: Recommended tools and methods for each metric type
